'''thabupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachberry|beachberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachberry|beachberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thabupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæbipith|thæbipith]] || [[word:thæbipij|thæbipij]] || [[word:thæbipish|thæbipish]] || [[word:thæbipi|thæbipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thabubuputh|thabubuputh]] || [[word:thabubupuj|thabubupuj]] || [[word:thabubupush|thabubupush]] || [[word:thabubupu|thabubupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabuputh|thabuputh]] || [[word:thabupuj|thabupuj]] || [[word:thabupush|thabupush]] || [[word:thabupu|thabupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabufputh|thabufputh]] || [[word:thabufpuj|thabufpuj]] || [[word:thabufpush|thabufpush]] || [[word:thabufpuf|thabufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thabuputhu|thabuputhu]] || [[word:thabupuju|thabupuju]] || [[word:thabupushu|thabupushu]] || [[word:thabupuku|thabupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thabuputh|thabuputh]] || [[word:thabupuj|thabupuj]] || [[word:thabupush|thabupush]] || [[word:thabupu|thabupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thabuputhul|thabuputhul]] || [[word:thabupujul|thabupujul]] || [[word:thabupushul|thabupushul]] || [[word:thabupukul|thabupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thabuputhuthu|thabuputhuthu]] || [[word:thabupujuju|thabupujuju]] || [[word:thabupushushu|thabupushushu]] || [[word:thabupuku|thabupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thabuputhun|thabuputhun]] || [[word:thabupujun|thabupujun]] || [[word:thabupushun|thabupushun]] || [[word:thabupukun|thabupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thabuputhuoro|thabuputhuoro]] || [[word:thabupujuoro|thabupujuoro]] || [[word:thabupushuoro|thabupushuoro]] || [[word:thabupukuoro|thabupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
